purpose: W3: exact emitter-owned closure for every body element and static visible text node in committed page bytes. Unmarked descendants inherit only their nearest explicit governed owner; top-level unowned elements or text red. Immutable W2 index debt is retained as fully resolved history; prototype-derived hydration is source/policy pinned until W4 promotes the claim to rendered DOM.

static_text_cover.normalization: body text; exclude script/style/template; collapse ASCII/HTML whitespace

coverage.classless_and_inline_scope: every static body element and visible text node is covered: an explicit data-dom-owner starts a narrow lineage and unmarked descendants inherit that nearest owner; ordered text facts preserve parent shape, boundary spaces, and NBSP while excluding script/style/template; computed inline values remain a W4 rendered-facts target
